meta.summary: Toolkit for reading, writing, editing, indexing, viewing, and summarizing SAM/BAM/CRAM alignment files.
meta.description: Toolkit for reading, writing, editing, indexing, viewing, and summarizing SAM/BAM/CRAM alignment files.

meta.summary: Toolkit for reading, writing, editing, indexing, viewing, and summarizing SAM/BAM/CRAM alignment files.
meta.description: Toolkit for reading, writing, editing, indexing, viewing, and summarizing SAM/BAM/CRAM alignment files.

test: samtools --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'Program: samtools' >/dev/null && samtools --version 2>&1 | grep -Fx 'samtools 1.24' >/dev/null && samtools --version 2>&1 | grep -Fx 'Using htslib 1.24' >/dev/null

samtools view --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'Usage: samtools view' >/dev/null && samtools sort --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'Usage: samtools sort' >/dev/null && samtools quickcheck --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'Usage: samtools quickcheck' >/dev/null && samtools tview --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'Usage: samtools tview' >/dev/null
samtools markdup --help 2>&1 | grep -F -- '--move-umi-to-tag' >/dev/null && samtools stats --help 2>&1 | grep -F -- '--customized-index' >/dev/null

work=/tmp/taf-samtools-core; mkdir -p $work; printf '@HD	VN:1.6	SO:unsorted
@SQ	SN:chr1	LN:100
r1	0	chr1	1	60	10M	*	0	0	AAAAAAAAAA	FFFFFFFFFF
r2	0	chr1	21	60	10M	*	0	0	ACGTACGTAC	FFFFFFFFFF
r3	0	chr1	41	60	10M	*	0	0	GCGCGCGCGC	FFFFFFFFFF
' > $work/in.sam; samtools view -b -o $work/in.bam $work/in.sam; samtools sort -o $work/sorted.bam $work/in.bam; samtools index $work/sorted.bam; samtools quickcheck $work/sorted.bam; test "$(samtools view -c $work/sorted.bam)" -eq 3; samtools flagstat $work/sorted.bam | grep -F '3 + 0 in total' >/dev/null; samtools stats $work/sorted.bam | grep -F 'raw total sequences:' >/dev/null; samtools idxstats $work/sorted.bam | grep -F 'chr1' >/dev/null

work=/tmp/taf-samtools-htslib; mkdir -p $work; printf 'chr1	0	10	geneA
chr1	20	30	geneB
' > $work/regions.bed; bgzip -c $work/regions.bed > $work/regions.bed.gz; tabix -p bed $work/regions.bed.gz; tabix $work/regions.bed.gz chr1:1-10 | grep -F 'geneA' >/dev/null; htsfile $work/regions.bed.gz | grep -iF 'BED' >/dev/null; printf 'chr1	1	10	geneA
' > $work/source.tsv; printf 'chr1	5	5	.
' > $work/target.tsv; annot-tsv -s $work/source.tsv -t $work/target.tsv -c 1,2,3:1,2,3 -f 4:4 | grep -F 'geneA' >/dev/null

work=/tmp/taf-samtools-plot; mkdir -p $work/plots; printf '@HD	VN:1.6	SO:unsorted
@SQ	SN:chr1	LN:100
r1	0	chr1	1	60	10M	*	0	0	AAAAAAAAAA	FFFFFFFFFF
r2	0	chr1	21	60	10M	*	0	0	ACGTACGTAC	FFFFFFFFFF
r3	0	chr1	41	60	10M	*	0	0	GCGCGCGCGC	FFFFFFFFFF
' > $work/in.sam; samtools view -b -o $work/in.bam $work/in.sam; samtools sort -o $work/sorted.bam $work/in.bam; samtools stats $work/sorted.bam > $work/stats.txt; plot-bamstats -p $work/plots/ $work/stats.txt; find $work/plots -type f -name '*.png' -size +0c | grep -q .; convert $work/plots/gc-content.png -scale 50% $work/thumbnail.png; test -s $work/thumbnail.png
work=/tmp/taf-samtools-refcache; mkdir -p $work; printf '>chr1\nACGTACGTACGT\n' > $work/ref.fa; seq_cache_populate.py -root $work/cache $work/ref.fa; find $work/cache -type f -size +0c | grep -q .

work=/tmp/taf-samtools-wgsim; mkdir -p $work; printf '>chr1\n' > $work/ref.fa; head -c 1000 /dev/zero | tr '\000' A >> $work/ref.fa; printf '\n' >> $work/ref.fa; wgsim -N 2 -1 20 -2 20 -d 100 -s 10 -e 0 -r 0 -R 0 -X 0 $work/ref.fa $work/read1.fq $work/read2.fq; test "$(wc -l < $work/read1.fq)" -eq 8; test "$(wc -l < $work/read2.fq)" -eq 8
printf '>chr,1\nACGT\n' | fasta-sanitize.pl | grep -Fx '>chr_1' >/dev/null && samtools.pl 2>&1 | grep -F 'Program: samtools.pl' >/dev/null

annot-tsv --help 2>&1 | grep -Fx 'Version: 1.24' >/dev/null && ref-cache 2>&1 | grep -F 'ref-cache [options]' >/dev/null && plot-bamstats -h 2>&1 | grep -F 'Usage: plot-bamstats' >/dev/null && plot-ampliconstats -help 2>&1 | grep -F 'Usage: plot-ampliconstats' >/dev/null && seq_cache_populate.py --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'Directory to create the refcache dir' >/dev/null

perl -MURI::Escape -e 'print uri_escape(qq(ok))' | grep -Fx ok >/dev/null && gnuplot --version >/dev/null && convert -version 2>&1 | grep -F ImageMagick >/dev/null && printf 'ok\n' | gzip -c | gunzip -c | grep -Fx ok >/dev/null
